summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Crystal hero redesign (iteration 5). Hero line 3 successfully redesigned with glass pill badges for 'architecture integrity' and 'domain purity' with blue dots. All CLI functionality perfect with A (100/100) scores. Frontend design excellent with proper pill badge styling and all required elements.
passed_tests: CLI: crystal check tests/fixtures/good_project returns A (100/100)
CLI: crystal check tests/fixtures/bad_project catches issues and fails correctly
CLI: crystal check . returns A (100/100) for self-check
CLI: crystal architect tests/fixtures/good_project generates architecture.md successfully
CLI: All 5 CLI commands work correctly
Frontend: Hero line 1 shows 'Crystal' in massive text
Frontend: Hero line 2 shows 'Clean code that ships.' in bold
Frontend: Hero line 3 redesigned with pill badges for 'architecture integrity' & 'domain purity'
Frontend: Pill badges have correct rounded styling with blue dots
Frontend: Commands table shows 7 commands including 'crystal architect'
Frontend: Footer contains 'Build with AI. Ship with Crystal.'
Frontend: All hero text is clearly readable with proper contrast
Frontend: Pill badges render as styled elements, not plain text paragraph
